title: Turkish Rice Rolls
description: A simple and flavorful dish with tangy and juicy Turkish-inspired flavors. It's perfect for a quick snack or lunch.
instructions: Prepare rice according to package instructions.
Cut Turkish rolls in half lengthwise.
Mix tangy sauce and juicy tomato paste in a small bowl.
Spread sauce mixture on the bottom half of each roll.
Add a scoop of cooked rice on top of the sauce.
Fold the top half of the roll to enclose the filling.
